bug.description: configuration mismatch between protocol layers causing inconsistent behavior

prompt:
There is a configuration mismatch between protocol layers causing inconsistent behavior downstream of function ue_supported_ul_layers in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB/nr_radio_config.c:1534.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
